raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Public Utilities Commission (PUC) introduced a plan to impose a tax on text messages.",
    "This tax would be the first of its kind in the nation.",
    "The Federal Communications Commission ruled that text messages are not telecommunications but 'information services.'",
    "This ruling established that text messages are under the purview of the federal Telecommunications Act.",
    "The PUC sees text messaging as a lucrative source of revenue to subsidize expanding social programs.",
    "Imposing a tax on text messages could negatively affect affordability for residents in California.",
    "Assembly Bill 162 would bar the PUC from collecting revenue for any communications service classified as an information service by the FCC.",
    "AB 162 would prevent the PUC from imposing a tax on any text service by calling it a 'utility reimbursement fee.'"
  ]
}
```
